a.curator_notes: Artist 'Yakari' (5BOhng5bYwJNOR8ckMWpUg) is the correct German children's Hörspiel series. Artist 'Yakari.' (4fUkVU0iJ24G3nfCllwoWs) is a Latin hip hop artist with a similar name - all their albums are excluded. The series includes 38 numbered episodes (Folge 1-38) plus the film adaptation 'Yakari - Das Hörspiel zum Film' as a special episode. Episodes were released out of order chronologically, with episodes 1-5 appearing in 2010 while episodes 13-16 were already released in 2006.
